subject: docs(todo): re-validate per-repo gaps via 13-agent parallel sweep (2026-04-25)
body:
Coverage confirmed complete (12 tracked + 3 excluded = 15 org repos, no new repos to track). Per-repo validation against live main found:

- synctone FULLY RESOLVED (PR #119, 2026-04-24): 12 items collapsed to verification summary
- graphiki FULLY RESOLVED (PR #53, 2026-04-23): Triggers + DOWNLOAD_PDF intentional skip documented at CLAUDE.md:710
- tool-till-tees migration COMPLETE (PR #24, 2026-04-23): CLAUDE.md/HISTORY/Triggers all done; remaining items down to 5 decisions/notes
- see-veo BURGER_MENU/THEME_DARK_MODE/EVENT_BUS reclassified Missing → N/A (resume site, intentional dark, no pub/sub)
- canva-grid: noted EVENT_BUS rationale undocumented in canva-grid CLAUDE.md (claim exists in this file but not in canva-grid)
- four-ems CRITICAL line-range fix: Suggested Implementations is L326-802 (~477 lines) not L328-957 — previous wording would have wiped the project-specific section L803-957
- model-pear, see-veo, few-lap, sun-sea-o: line-drift corrections + path fixes
- glow-props (self): new TIMER_LEAKS self-audit Tech Debt item — pattern upstreamed but src/pwa.js + src/markdown.js have raw timers without visible cleanup; Tech Debt flash-prevention duplication reworded (auto-generated by scripts/generate-meta-colors.mjs, not manual sync risk)

Gap Matrix updated: 6 repos now FULLY RESOLVED (canva-grid, budgy-ting, repo-tor, sun-sea-o, graphiki, synctone). Cross-Cutting Gaps recomputed.
